title: How GCSE and A level grading works – teachers’ and headteachers’ guide
body: "As teachers and school and college leaders, you play a crucial role in helping your community understand the GCSE and A level grading process. This overview will give you the technical detail you need to confidently answer questions from students, other staff and parents.   "
